item.title: First reading, referred to Consumer Protection & Business.

item.title: 👍Helen Torris - Advocacy Chair for the American Society of Interior Designers, WA chapter
item.description: Helen Torris signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Advocacy Chair for the American Society of Interior Designers, WA chapter.

item.title: 👍Brooke Hammond - Advocacy Chair for the American Society of Interior Designers, WA chapter
item.description: Brooke Hammond signed up to testify Pro.

item.title: ❓Clarissa Easton - American Institute of Architects Washington Council
item.description: Clarissa Easton signed up to testify Other. They are signed up to represent American Institute of Architects Washington Council.
